RULING:
DEFENDANT REX MOORE ELECTRICAL CONTRACTORS AND ENGINEERS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Rex Moore Electrical Contractors and Engineers, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and amended declaration and Ms. Huerto's amended declaration create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to asbestos-containing concrete refrigeration panels attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to plaintiff's declaration are overruled. Defendant's objections to the amended declarations of plaintiff are sustained in part, denied in part; and Ms. Huerto are overruled. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542 = (220/HEK)
